sourceMovie.title: Incantation
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Incantation (2022) stuck because it commits to its horror premise without apologizing—viewers remember set pieces and momentum as much as plot. Kevin Ko's control of tone keeps the ride coherent. The film leans hard into its core genre, which is exactly what fans say they wanted more of from blockbusters in that era.

recommendations.title: The Conjuring: The Devil Made Me Do It
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Incantation clicked for you, The Conjuring: The Devil Made Me Do It (2021) is a strong next stop: both trade in horror, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Incantation?
faq.answer: Try The Conjuring: The Devil Made Me Do It, A Nightmare on Elm Street, Paranormal Activity—each shares DNA with Incantation while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Incantation?
faq.answer: Incantation (2022) is best described as Horror. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Incantation worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.8/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this horror lane.
